# UC-13.2.41 · Fluentd Output Forward ACK Timeout and Node Ban Patterns

> **Criticality:** Medium &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Fault, Resilience &middot; **Status:** Draft

*We watch how we use and protect smart assistant and model calls so cost, quality, and misuse stay in a range we are willing to own.*

---

## Description

Persistent ACK failures drop backpressure signals and lose chunks upstream.

## Value

Highlights degraded upstream Splunk HEC or aggregator tiers.

## Implementation

Match `server_host` to load balancer VIP; alert before `hard_timeout` expels nodes.

## SPL

```spl
index=fluent sourcetype="fluentd:log" OR sourcetype="fluentd:plugins"
| search "forward" AND ("ack" OR "timeout" OR "not responding" OR "connection refused")
| stats count by host, server_host, plugin_id
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Table (upstream × plugin), Line chart (failure rate).

## Known False Positives

Buffer pain from downstream saturation, bad TLS, or local disk. We check agent and destination before blind buffer tuning.

## References

- [Fluent Bit monitoring — storage](https://docs.fluentbit.io/manual/administration/monitoring)
- [Fluentd monitoring](https://docs.fluentd.org/deployment/monitoring)
